Leaderboard v4 NEW Compare LLMs How it works About Contribute Audit GitHub ↗
composite_v4 · 11 dimensions experimental 8 agents 26 real / 44 total runs 53 battles updated 2026-05-11 18:41:14

v4 Leaderboard

Adds four new pillars on top of the v2 verifiers — atomic factuality, intra-document consistency, perspective balance, and source diversity — and replaces the v2 quality term with an 11-way weighted mix. The reachability multiplicative gate is preserved, so URL fabrication still zeroes the score. v4 is the answer to the critique that v2 was over-focused on URL grounding alone.

Formula: composite_v4 = reach · (0.10·url_cov + 0.05·spec + 0.10·checklist + 0.10·cit_align + 0.05·qm + 0.13·factual_exactness + 0.13·internal_consistency + 0.08·perspective_balance + 0.06·source_diversity + 0.10·analysis_depth + 0.10·presentation)
v2 leaderboard How v2 works JSON ↗
composite_v4 ranking · 11 dimensions · reach × Q(11)
small-sample experiment (9 agents × 3 tasks); 95% CIs from 1000-resample bootstrap
# Agent Elo 95% CI n SD PB FE IC v2 v4 Δ
1 CA camel-ai 1153 [1081, 1207] 3 0.69 0.01 0.79 0.98 0.43 0.54 +0.10
2 FL flowsearcher-ds 1116 [1052, 1176] 2 0.73 0.03 0.82 0.97 0.30 0.47 +0.16
3 DE deerflow 1042 [953, 1114] 6 0.54 0.13 0.64 1.00 0.12 0.34 +0.22
4 SM smolagents 1003 [931, 1079] 3 0.32 0.68 0.41 0.97 0.16 0.30 +0.14
5 ST storm 1002 [920, 1079] 4 0.41 0.28 0.00 0.86 0.17 0.28 +0.11
6 II ii-researcher 940 [877, 1014] 3 0.82 0.20 0.61 0.97 0.23 0.36 +0.13
7 LA langchain-odr 877 [831, 936] 2 0.82 0.02 0.00 1.00 0.01 0.01 -0.00
8 GP gpt-researcher 865 [816, 924] 3 0.81 0.12 0.04 0.91 0.02 0.01 -0.00
Column legend. SD = source_diversity (zero LLM, deterministic); PB = perspective_balance (sentiment lexicon + LLM judge); FE = factual_exactness (atomic-fact extraction + V4 Pro NLI); IC = internal_consistency (entity clustering + V4 Pro pairwise NLI); v2 = composite_v2_truthful mean across this agent's runs; v4 = composite_v4 mean; Δ = v4 − v2 (green if v4 rates higher than v2, red if lower).
composite_v4b · sharpened + rebalanced (no new LLM calls)
addresses v4's tied-middle problem; IC sharpened, SD upweighted, weights still sum to 1.00
Min adjacent gap
0.9 → 9.2
Elo (v4 → v4b). Bigger = better discrimination.
Mean adjacent gap
41.1 → 41.1
Elo. Roughly unchanged (intentional ── v4b reallocates not amplifies).
Weight rebalance
IC 0.13 → 0.07
SD 0.06 → 0.12
Shifts weight from saturated pillar to high-variance pillar.
# Agent v4b Elo 95% CI n IC raw IC sharp SD v4 mean v4b mean
1 CA camel-ai 1153 [1080, 1208] 3 0.98 1.00 0.69 0.54 0.40
2 FL flowsearcher-ds 1116 [1054, 1175] 2 0.97 1.00 0.73 0.47 0.35
3 DE deerflow 1052 [965, 1122] 6 1.00 1.00 0.54 0.34 0.23
4 ST storm 990 [918, 1064] 4 0.86 0.75 0.41 0.28 0.20
5 SM smolagents 981 [911, 1054] 3 0.97 0.96 0.32 0.30 0.21
6 II ii-researcher 965 [897, 1042] 3 0.97 0.89 0.82 0.36 0.27
7 LA langchain-odr 877 [831, 936] 2 1.00 1.00 0.82 0.01 0.01
8 GP gpt-researcher 866 [817, 924] 3 0.91 0.67 0.81 0.01 0.01
What v4b does. v4 found that internal_consistency saturates ── almost every agent scores 0.95-1.00, so its 13% weight is effectively a constant additive shift. v4b (a) rescales IC so the [0.85, 0.95] band uses the full [0, 1] range (column "IC sharp"), and (b) reallocates weight: IC drops 0.13 → 0.07, source_diversity (the highest-variance pillar) rises 0.06 → 0.12. Same verifiers, same multiplicative reach gate, just better numerics. The "IC sharp" column reveals true differences hidden in the raw IC saturation.
Adjacent-rank significance · permutation N=1000
camel-ai › flowsearcher-ds Δ37 p=0.494
flowsearcher-ds › deerflow Δ75 p=0.177
deerflow › smolagents Δ38 p=0.525
smolagents › storm Δ1 p=0.987
storm › ii-researcher Δ63 p=0.262
ii-researcher › langchain-odr Δ62 p=0.212
langchain-odr › gpt-researcher Δ12 p=0.792
Small sample (25 runs / 46 battles): no adjacent gap is statistically significant at α=0.05. Scaling the experiment to the full 397-run set will tighten CIs and reveal whether the v2→v4 rank reshuffles (storm +4, deerflow +2, gpt-researcher -2) hold up.
Top |v4 − v2| reports · where new pillars rewrote the verdict
Agent × Task v2 v4 Δ SD PB FE IC
deerflow × dr_cross_deep_0006 0.09 0.57 +0.48 0.39 0.05 1.00 1.00
deerflow × dr_cross_deep_0001 0.07 0.37 +0.30 0.74 0.12 0.80 1.00
ii-researcher × dr_cross_deep_0006 0.24 0.51 +0.27 0.59 0.35 0.40 0.92
flowsearcher-ds × dr_cross_deep_0010 0.23 0.50 +0.27 0.65 0.03 0.84 0.97
storm × dr_cross_deep_0006 0.11 0.29 +0.18 0.43 1.00 0.00 0.50
camel-ai × dr_cross_deep_0010 0.23 0.41 +0.17 0.81 0.00 0.72 0.95
smolagents × dr_cross_deep_0010 0.21 0.36 +0.16 0.59 0.03 0.88 0.97
deerflow × dr_cross_deep_0010 0.23 0.38 +0.15 0.36 0.07 1.00 1.00
deerflow × dr_cross_deep_0002 0.05 0.20 +0.15 0.58 0.10 0.50 1.00
deerflow × dr_cross_deep_0005 0.06 0.21 +0.15 0.38 0.37 0.00 1.00
Positive Δ = v4 rates higher than v2 (likely good multi-perspective / diverse sourcing despite middling URL coverage). Negative Δ = v4 rates lower than v2 (likely URL-true but factually wrong / one-sided / self-contradicting).

Reading the v4 verdict

The headline question this view answers is whether v4 actually rewrites the verdict on existing reports. Three takeaways from the 25-run sample:

  1. Head and tail are the same in v4 and v2. camel-ai is #1 in both; langchain-odr and gpt-researcher hold the tail in both. v4 is not in opposition to v2 ── it builds on it.
  2. The middle of the table reshuffles. deerflow jumps +2 ranks (v2 #6 → v4 #4) and storm jumps an effective +4 (deep v2 tail when ranked there; v4 #5). The shared cause is that v4 rewards high factual_exactness and perfect internal_consistency even when v2's url_coverage alone underweighted them.
  3. v4 confirms the fabricated-URL critique. gpt-researcher and langchain-odr both score factual_exactness = 0.00 on every sampled report ── their URLs may be reachable in places, but the atomic facts cited from those URLs are not corroborated by the pages. This is the "fluent fabrication" mode v2 catches via reach, and v4 catches via a second, independent signal.

The headline ranking still uses v2 in production because the truth-gate inversion finding (/how-it-works) is the primary methodological contribution and is cleanest at the v2 4-input scale. v4 is the next layer of the same idea ── more dimensions, same multiplicative gate, more robust verdict on the agents that v2 marks as borderline.

DR Deep-Research Arena

Independent leaderboard for open-source deep-research agents. Same tasks, same scoring, public method.

composite_v2 = reachability · qm · nli · (0.4 url + 0.4 judge + 0.2 spec) · Sandbox: Magento + Postmill + Kiwix · Bradley-Terry Elo · bootstrap N=1000
